name: RuleTester reports an invalid case as passing when the rule's detector exits non-zero (violation found)
command:
mkdir -p tests/my-rule/invalid && printf 'eval("bad")
' > tests/my-rule/invalid/a.ts && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
exit 1
' > stub.sh && chmod +x stub.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/test-rule.sh" my-rule --tests-dir tests --detector stub.sh 2>out.txt && grep -q 'pass=1' out.txt && grep -q 'fail=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
